{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = life (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] can inhale life from others as a bright green wisp.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
